creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of sysutils/wmapm

diff -urN sysutils/wmapm/pkg/DESCR.orig sysutils/wmapm/pkg/DESCR
--- sysutils/wmapm/pkg/DESCR.orig       Thu Jan 20 09:44:35 2000
+++ sysutils/wmapm/pkg/DESCR    Thu Jan 20 09:44:52 2000
@@ -11,3 +11,5 @@
 
 NOTE2: You should add your acount name to operetor in /etc/group, if
 you resume or suspend your PC by clicking the button in wmapm.
+
+WWW: http://nis-www.lanl.gov/~mgh/WindowMaker/DockApps.shtml
